# daytona_sandbox_auth_token_validation (Data Source)

Validates a Daytona sandbox auth token through the preview API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_auth_token_validation" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
  auth_token = "sandbox-auth-token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_token` (String, Sensitive) Sandbox auth token to validate.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Sandbox ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `valid` (Boolean) Whether the sandbox auth token is valid.
